eldritch_blast.name: Eldritch Blast
eldritch_blast.description: Setup/Builder: A beam of crackling void energy. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Entropy.

curse_of_agony.name: Curse of Agony
curse_of_agony.description: Setup: Inflict suffering on the target. Applies [Cursed] and generates 2 Entropy.

soul_cleave.name: Soul Cleave
soul_cleave.description: Payoff: Tear at the target's essence. Consumes 5 Entropy to deal heavy Magic damage and heal for 20% of damage dealt.

oblivion_strike.name: Oblivion Strike
oblivion_strike.description: Payoff: Strike from the void. Consumes all current Entropy to deal necrotic damage based on missing target health.

void_ward.name: Void Ward
void_ward.description: Defense: Surround yourself with entropic shielding. The next 3 hits taken drain the attacker's stamina.

hex_of_weakness.name: Hex of Weakness
hex_of_weakness.description: Defense/Debuff: Weaken a foe's offensive power. Reduces target's damage output by 50% for 4 ticks.

netherstep.name: Netherstep
netherstep.description: Mobility: Blink through the void, leaving a trail of shadow.

pact_of_sacrifice.name: Pact of Sacrifice
pact_of_sacrifice.description: Utility/Signature: Trade your own life for absolute power. Consumes 25% current HP to instantly gain 10 Entropy and full Concentration.

warlock_physiology.name: Warlock Physiology
warlock_physiology.description: Passive: Echoes of the Void. You gain 10% increased Entropy generation and 15% Magic power when below 50% HP.
